callGraph.callee:
publicProcedure
			.input(
				z.object({
					paneId: SAFE_ID,
					requestId: z.string().min(1).optional(),
					joinPending: z.boolean().optional(),
					tabId: z.string(),
					workspaceId: SAFE_ID,
					cols: z.number().optional(),
					rows: z.number().optional(),
					cwd: z.string().optional(),
					command: z.string().trim().min(1).optional(),
					skipColdRestore: z.boolean().optional(),
					allowKilled: z.boolean().optional(),
					themeType: z.enum(["dark", "light"]).optional(),
				}),
			)
			.mutation

localDb
		.select({
			workspace: workspaces,
			mainRepoPath: projects.mainRepoPath,
			worktreePath: worktrees.path,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.leftJoin(projects, eq(projects.id, workspaces.projectId))
		.leftJoin(worktrees, eq(worktrees.id, workspaces.worktreeId))
		.where(eq(workspaces.id, workspaceId))
		.get

localDb
		.select({
			workspace: workspaces,
			mainRepoPath: projects.mainRepoPath,
			worktreePath: worktrees.path,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.leftJoin(projects, eq(projects.id, workspaces.projectId))
		.leftJoin(worktrees, eq(worktrees.id, workspaces.worktreeId))
		.where

localDb
		.select({
			workspace: workspaces,
			mainRepoPath: projects.mainRepoPath,
			worktreePath: worktrees.path,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.leftJoin(projects, eq(projects.id, workspaces.projectId))
		.leftJoin

localDb
		.select({
			workspace: workspaces,
			mainRepoPath: projects.mainRepoPath,
			worktreePath: worktrees.path,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.leftJoin

localDb
		.select({
			workspace: workspaces,
			mainRepoPath: projects.mainRepoPath,
			worktreePath: worktrees.path,
		})
		.from

functions.name: importLiveExternalWorktrees
params:
{
	project,
	allExternalWorktrees,
	projectWorktrees,
	activeWorktreeIds,
	compareBaseBranch,
	requested,
}

callGraph.callee:
localDb
			.update(worktrees)
			.set({
				branch,
				baseBranch,
				createdAt,
				gitStatus,
				githubStatus: null,
				createdBySuperset: false,
			})
			.where(eq(worktrees.id, existingWorktree.id))
			.run

localDb
			.update(worktrees)
			.set({
				branch,
				baseBranch,
				createdAt,
				gitStatus,
				githubStatus: null,
				createdBySuperset: false,
			})
			.where

localDb
		.insert(worktrees)
		.values({
			projectId,
			path,
			branch,
			baseBranch,
			createdAt,
			gitStatus,
			createdBySuperset: false,
		})
		.returning()
		.get

localDb
		.insert(worktrees)
		.values({
			projectId,
			path,
			branch,
			baseBranch,
			createdAt,
			gitStatus,
			createdBySuperset: false,
		})
		.returning

localDb
		.select({ worktreeId: workspaces.worktreeId })
		.from(workspaces)
		.where(
			and(eq(workspaces.projectId, projectId), isNull(workspaces.deletingAt)),
		)
		.all

localDb
		.insert(workspaces)
		.values({
			projectId,
			worktreeId,
			type: "worktree",
			branch,
			name: branch,
			...(isUnnamed ? { isUnnamed } : {}),
			tabOrder: maxTabOrder + 1,
		})
		.run

localDb
		.insert(worktrees)
		.values({
			projectId: project.id,
			path: worktreePath,
			branch: localBranchName,
			baseBranch: compareBaseBranch,
			gitStatus: null,
			createdBySuperset: true,
		})
		.returning()
		.get

localDb
		.insert(worktrees)
		.values({
			projectId: project.id,
			path: worktreePath,
			branch: localBranchName,
			baseBranch: compareBaseBranch,
			gitStatus: null,
			createdBySuperset: true,
		})
		.returning

z
					.object({
						projectId: z.string(),
						name: z.string().optional(),
						prompt: z.string().optional(),
						branchName: z.string().optional(),
						compareBaseBranch: z.string().optional(),
						sourceWorkspaceId: z.string().optional(),
						useExistingBranch: z.boolean().optional(),
						applyPrefix: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
					})
					.refine(
						(data) => !(data.compareBaseBranch && data.sourceWorkspaceId),
						{
							message:
								"Cannot specify both compareBaseBranch and sourceWorkspaceId. Use one or the other.",
						},
					)
					.refine

z
					.object({
						projectId: z.string(),
						name: z.string().optional(),
						prompt: z.string().optional(),
						branchName: z.string().optional(),
						compareBaseBranch: z.string().optional(),
						sourceWorkspaceId: z.string().optional(),
						useExistingBranch: z.boolean().optional(),
						applyPrefix: z.boolean().optional().default(true),
					})
					.refine

localDb
					.insert(worktrees)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						path: worktreePath,
						branch,
						baseBranch: compareBaseBranch,
						gitStatus: null,
						createdBySuperset: true,
					})
					.returning()
					.get

localDb
					.insert(worktrees)
					.values({

						path: worktreePath,
						branch,
						baseBranch: compareBaseBranch,
						gitStatus: null,
						createdBySuperset: true,
					})
					.returning

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						worktreeId: worktree.id,
						type: "worktree",
						branch,
						name: input.name ?? branch,
						isUnnamed: !input.name,
						tabOrder: maxTabOrder + 1,
					})
					.returning()
					.get

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						worktreeId: worktree.id,
						type: "worktree",
						branch,
						name: input.name ?? branch,
						isUnnamed: !input.name,
						tabOrder: maxTabOrder + 1,
					})
					.returning

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						type: "branch",
						branch,
						name: branch,
						tabOrder: 0,
					})
					.onConflictDoNothing()
					.returning()
					.all

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						type: "branch",
						branch,
						name: branch,
						tabOrder: 0,
					})
					.onConflictDoNothing()
					.returning

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						type: "branch",
						branch,
						name: branch,
						tabOrder: 0,
					})
					.onConflictDoNothing

localDb
						.select()
						.from(workspaces)
						.where(
							and(
								eq(workspaces.projectId, input.projectId),
								// Exclude the workspace we just inserted
								not(eq(workspaces.id, newWorkspaceId)),
								isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
							),
						)
						.all

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: worktree.projectId,
						worktreeId: worktree.id,
						type: "worktree",
						branch: worktree.branch,
						name: input.name ?? worktree.branch,
						isUnnamed: !input.name,
						tabOrder: maxTabOrder + 1,
					})
					.returning()
					.get

localDb
					.insert(workspaces)
					.values({
						projectId: worktree.projectId,
						worktreeId: worktree.id,
						type: "worktree",
						branch: worktree.branch,
						name: input.name ?? worktree.branch,
						isUnnamed: !input.name,
						tabOrder: maxTabOrder + 1,

					.returning

localDb
					.select()
					.from(worktrees)
					.where(
						and(
							eq(worktrees.projectId, input.projectId),
							eq(worktrees.branch, localBranchName),

					)
					.get

localDb
					.select({
						id: worktrees.id,
						path: worktrees.path,
						branch: worktrees.branch,
					})
					.from(worktrees)
					.where(eq(worktrees.projectId, input.projectId))

localDb
					.select({
						id: worktrees.id,
						path: worktrees.path,
						branch: worktrees.branch,

					.from(worktrees)
					.where

localDb
					.select({

						branch: worktrees.branch,

					.from

localDb
					.select({ id: workspaces.id, worktreeId: workspaces.worktreeId })
					.from(workspaces)
					.where(
						and(
							eq(workspaces.projectId, input.projectId),
							isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
						),
					)
					.all

allSections
					.filter((s) => s.projectId === project.id)
					.sort((a, b) => a.tabOrder - b.tabOrder)
					.map

computeVisualOrder(
		[{ id: projectId, tabOrder: 0 }],
		projectWorkspaces,
		projectSections,
	).filter

localDb
				.update(workspaces)
				.set({
					tabOrder: item.tabOrder,
					...(movingWorkspaceIdSet.has(item.id) ? { sectionId: null } : {}),
				})
				.where(eq(workspaces.id, item.id))
				.run

localDb
					.insert(workspaceSections)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						name: input.name,
						tabOrder: nextTabOrder,
						color: randomSectionColor(),
					})
					.returning()
					.get

localDb
					.insert(workspaceSections)
					.values({
						projectId: input.projectId,
						name: input.name,
						tabOrder: nextTabOrder,
						color: randomSectionColor(),
					})
					.returning

localDb
						.update(worktrees)
						.set({ branch })
						.where(
							and(
								eq(worktrees.id, workspace.worktreeId),
								not(eq(worktrees.branch, branch)),
							),
						)
						.run

localDb
		.select({
			id: workspaces.id,
			branch: workspaces.branch,
			name: workspaces.name,
			isUnnamed: workspaces.isUnnamed,
			deletingAt: workspaces.deletingAt,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.where(eq(workspaces.id, workspaceId))
		.get

localDb
		.select({

			name: workspaces.name,
			isUnnamed: workspaces.isUnnamed,
			deletingAt: workspaces.deletingAt,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.where

localDb
		.select({
			id: workspaces.id,
			branch: workspaces.branch,
			name: workspaces.name,
			isUnnamed: workspaces.isUnnamed,
			deletingAt: workspaces.deletingAt,
		})
		.from

localDb
		.update(workspaces)
		.set({
			name: decision.name,
			isUnnamed: false,
			updatedAt: Date.now(),
		})
		.where(
			and(
				eq(workspaces.id, workspace.id),
				eq(workspaces.branch, workspace.branch),
				eq(workspaces.isUnnamed, true),
				isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
			),
		)
		.run

localDb
		.update(workspaces)
		.set({
			name: decision.name,
			isUnnamed: false,
			updatedAt: Date.now(),
		})
		.where

localDb
		.select({
			branch: workspaces.branch,
			name: workspaces.name,
			isUnnamed: workspaces.isUnnamed,
			deletingAt: workspaces.deletingAt,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.where(eq(workspaces.id, workspace.id))
		.get

localDb
		.select({
			branch: workspaces.branch,
			name: workspaces.name,
			isUnnamed: workspaces.isUnnamed,
			deletingAt: workspaces.deletingAt,
		})
		.from(workspaces)
		.where

localDb
		.select({
			branch: workspaces.branch,
			name: workspaces.name,
			isUnnamed: workspaces.isUnnamed,
			deletingAt: workspaces.deletingAt,
		})
		.from

localDb
		.insert(settings)
		.values({ id: 1, lastActiveWorkspaceId: workspaceId })
		.onConflictDoUpdate({
			target: settings.id,
			set: { lastActiveWorkspaceId: workspaceId },
		})
		.run

localDb
		.update(projects)
		.set({
			lastOpenedAt: Date.now(),
			tabOrder:
				project.tabOrder === null ? maxProjectTabOrder + 1 : project.tabOrder,
		})
		.where(eq(projects.id, project.id))
		.run

localDb
		.update(projects)
		.set({
			lastOpenedAt: Date.now(),
			tabOrder:
				project.tabOrder === null ? maxProjectTabOrder + 1 : project.tabOrder,
		})
		.where

localDb
		.select({ id: workspaces.id, lastOpenedAt: workspaces.lastOpenedAt })
		.from(workspaces)
		.innerJoin(projects, eq(workspaces.projectId, projects.id))
		.where(
			and(
				isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
				isNotNull(projects.tabOrder), // Only visible projects
			),
		)
		.orderBy(desc(workspaces.lastOpenedAt))
		.all

localDb
		.select({ id: workspaces.id, lastOpenedAt: workspaces.lastOpenedAt })
		.from(workspaces)
		.innerJoin(projects, eq(workspaces.projectId, projects.id))
		.where(
			and(
				isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
				isNotNull(projects.tabOrder), // Only visible projects
			),

localDb
		.select({ id: workspaces.id, lastOpenedAt: workspaces.lastOpenedAt })
		.from(workspaces)
		.innerJoin(projects, eq(workspaces.projectId, projects.id))
		.where

localDb
		.update(workspaces)
		.set({
			lastOpenedAt: now,
			updatedAt: now,
			...additionalFields,
		})
		.where(eq(workspaces.id, workspaceId))
		.run

localDb
		.select()
		.from(workspaces)
		.where(
			and(
				eq(workspaces.projectId, projectId),
				eq(workspaces.type, "branch"),
				isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
			),
		)
		.get

localDb
		.select({ workspace: workspaces, worktree: worktrees })
		.from(workspaces)
		.innerJoin(worktrees, eq(workspaces.worktreeId, worktrees.id))
		.where(
			and(
				eq(workspaces.projectId, projectId),
				eq(workspaces.type, "worktree"),
				eq(workspaces.branch, branch),
				isNull(workspaces.deletingAt),
			),
		)
		.get

localDb
		.select({ workspace: workspaces, worktree: worktrees })
		.from(workspaces)
		.innerJoin(worktrees, eq(workspaces.worktreeId, worktrees.id))
		.where
